introSection: Joker is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Six Flags New England in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On September 1, 2016, it was announced that three Joker-themed roller coasters would be coming to Six Flags Over Texas, Six Flags Great America and Six Flags New England.

The Joker opened on May 27, 2017. It is located on the former site of Splashwater Falls.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Joker is a 4D Free Spin built by S&S Worldwide. It is a clone of Batman The Ride at Six Flags Fiesta Texas and Joker at Six Flags Great Adventure. Three other clones were also constructed for the 2017 season at Six Flags Over Texas, Six Flags Great America and Nagashima Spa Land.

fullText:
Joker is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Six Flags New England in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA.

On September 1, 2016, it was announced that three Joker-themed roller coasters would be coming to Six Flags Over Texas, Six Flags Great America and Six Flags New England.

The Joker opened on May 27, 2017. It is located on the former site of Splashwater Falls.

Joker is a 4D Free Spin built by S&S Worldwide. It is a clone of Batman The Ride at Six Flags Fiesta Texas and Joker at Six Flags Great Adventure. Three other clones were also constructed for the 2017 season at Six Flags Over Texas, Six Flags Great America and Nagashima Spa Land.
